reforms.description: The administration set aside US$2 billion for modernising the unemployment insurance system, aiming to improve administrative capacity and integrate benefit payments with active labour market services.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the unemployment insurance system can improve job matching and support active labour market policies, which are essential for economic recovery and resilience.
reforms.status_evidence: Funding was allocated for modernising the unemployment insurance system.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform addresses significant shortcomings in the unemployment insurance system, aiming to enhance its effectiveness and link it with active labour market policies, which is crucial for economic stability.
reforms.source_quote: The administration set aside US$2 billion for modernising the unemployment insurance system in the American Rescue Plan in early 2021.

reforms.description: The Inflation Reduction Act, passed in August 2022, includes significant investments in clean technology manufacturing and energy efficiency, aimed at decarbonizing the economy and enhancing energy security.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investments in clean technology and energy efficiency are expected to stimulate innovation, create jobs, and reduce emissions, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Inflation Reduction Act was passed by Congress and signed into law.
reforms.importance_rationale: This act represents a comprehensive approach to addressing climate change through substantial public investment, which is expected to have long-lasting effects on the economy and innovation landscape.
reforms.source_quote: In August 2022, Congress passed the Inflation and Reduction Act, a major climate and tax bill that included spending initiatives and tax changes to finance them.

reforms.description: As part of the Inflation Reduction Act, Medicare will be able to directly negotiate prescription drug prices with manufacturers, which is expected to reduce public health spending significantly over the next decade.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By allowing price negotiations, the reform aims to lower healthcare costs, potentially increasing access to medications and improving overall health outcomes, which can enhance productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The legislation was enacted as part of the Inflation Reduction Act.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in how Medicare manages drug pricing, which could have widespread implications for healthcare costs and access in the United States.
reforms.source_quote: As part of the recent Inflation Reduction Act, Medicare will be able to directly negotiate prescription drug prices with manufacturers and impose a tax penalty if drug companies increase their prices faster than inflation.

reforms.description: The Inflation Reduction Act expands clean energy tax credits for various renewable energy sources and carbon capture technologies, aiming to stimulate investment in clean energy and promote innovation in the sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing investment in clean energy technologies, the reform is expected to enhance innovation and create jobs in the renewable energy sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The act was passed into law and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The expansion of clean energy tax credits represents a significant shift in federal policy towards promoting renewable energy and innovation, with potential long-term impacts on the economy and environment.
reforms.source_quote: The Inflation Reduction Act expands clean energy tax credits for wind, solar, nuclear, clean hydrogen, clean fuels and carbon capture.

reforms.description: The Inflation Reduction Act includes US$200 million in grants for training contractors involved in the installation of home energy efficiency and electrification improvements, aiming to enhance workforce skills in the clean energy sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving skills in the workforce, this reform supports the transition to a clean energy economy, which can enhance productivity and innovation in the sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The grants for training contractors were included in the legislation of the Inflation Reduction Act.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in human capital aimed at facilitating the transition to a clean energy economy, which is crucial for long-term sustainability and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The Inflation Reduction Act includes US$200 million in grants for training contractors involved in installation of home energy efficiency and electrification improvements.

reforms.description: The Inflation Reduction Act includes US$1 billion in grants to state and local governments to adopt the latest building energy codes and implement more stringent zero-energy codes for buildings with net zero energy consumption.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing the adoption of advanced energy codes, the reform aims to enhance energy efficiency in buildings, which can lead to lower energy costs and reduced emissions.
reforms.status_evidence: The act has been passed and includes specific funding allocations.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in energy efficiency and climate policy, aiming to transform building standards across the country, which has long-term implications for energy consumption and emissions.
reforms.source_quote: The Inflation Reduction Act includes US$1 billion in grants to state and local governments to adopt the latest building energy codes and to implement more stringent zero-energy codes for buildings.

reforms.description: The Inflation Reduction Act has modified the federal tax credit for electric vehicle purchases by eliminating the manufacturer's phase-out cap and introducing new eligibility criteria, including income limits and vehicle price restrictions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing electric vehicle purchases, the reform promotes innovation in clean transportation technologies and supports the transition to a low-carbon economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The Act has been passed and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the federal tax credit system for electric vehicles, which is crucial for promoting clean technology adoption and addressing climate change.
reforms.source_quote: The Inflation Reduction Act has introduced changes to the existing non-refundable federal tax credit of up to US$ 7500 for the purchase of an electric car in the United States.

reforms.description: The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act has allocated US$5 billion over five years for building electric vehicle charging stations, aiming to enhance the infrastructure necessary for EV adoption.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in charging infrastructure facilitates the adoption of electric vehicles, thereby supporting innovation in clean transportation and reducing greenhouse gas emissions.
reforms.status_evidence: The Act was passed and funding is being allocated for the construction of charging stations.
reforms.importance_rationale: This funding represents a major investment in the infrastructure necessary for the transition to electric vehicles, which is critical for achieving climate goals.
reforms.source_quote: The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act passed in November 2021 also includes US$5 billion over five years to be spent on building charging stations.
